vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] improve logging for init dist
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Often times we see issue reports of hang during initialization. This might be caused by improper setup of ray or distributed environment.
Adding this logging will produce debugging information before the process gets stuck, helping the future debugging.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix_log_time_in_metrics
vllm.author: zspo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have noticed that now in _get_throughput is time.time(), but self.last_local_log is time.monotonic(), these two function cannot be used to subtract to compute the duration.
This affects the throughput of calculations.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix_small_bug_in_neuron_executor
vllm.author: zspo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: fix missing required positional argument cache_config when init NeuronWorker.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add punica dimension for Baichuan-13B
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Baichuan-13B's hidden_size is 5120, and the merged qkv size is 15360. To enable Baichuan-13B to support LoRA, it should incorporate an additional size of 15360 into Punica.




fix lora/text_baichuan.py function name error, by the way

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Core] feat: Add model loading using `tensorizer`
vllm.author: sangstar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Feature Request Issue

Tensorizer Support
This PR allows models used for the OpenAI-compatible API server to be loaded using
Coreweave's Tensorizer, enabling extremely fast (faster than cached Safetensors) model loads from HTTP/HTTPS,
Redis, and S3 endpoints.
The key changes involved are:

Adds Tens

vllm.title: [Core] avoid too many cuda context by caching p2p test
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It is observed in #3821  that every worker takes memory in every GPU in _can_p2p  , because the test will make all process allocate cuda context for every GPU, in total leading to $n * (n-1)$ cuda context.
To avoid this, we can cache the test of p2p test.
Before this PR (tp=4):
nvidia-smi
Thu Apr 11
